summary: Testing of new BITZ Club features: Julian Member ID generation (YYDDDNNNNN), Offline Member Creation with 3-tab form (Brief/Personal/Payment), Plans Maintenance Configuration, and Payment verification. Backend: 17/17 tests passed. Frontend: 22/22 new tests passed (11 offline-member + 11 plans-maintenance).
seed_data_creation: Test data created and cleaned up during test runs using TEST_ prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features verified working. Test credentials: admin 9999999999/admin123. Julian Member ID format verified: 10 digits YYDDDNNNNN (e.g., 2607600001 for year 2026, day 076, sequence 00001). Offline Member Creation via /admin/members/add with 3 tabs working. Plans Maintenance Configuration with type/amount/GST/billing cycle fields working. Existing auth-flows test has 1 flaky test (member login) - not related to new features.

features_verified.julian_member_id_format: WORKING - 10-digit format YYDDDNNNNN verified via backend API tests
features_verified.julian_id_sequential_increment: WORKING - Counter increments correctly in MongoDB counters collection
features_verified.offline_member_creation_endpoint: WORKING - POST /api/admin/members/offline creates members with Julian IDs
features_verified.offline_member_duplicate_rejection: WORKING - Duplicate mobile numbers correctly rejected
features_verified.offline_member_page_3_tabs: WORKING - Brief, Personal Details, Payment Details tabs visible and functional
features_verified.family_members_section: WORKING - Add Family Member button works in Personal Details tab
features_verified.payment_plan_selection: WORKING - Plan dropdown in Payment Details tab loads plans
features_verified.payment_summary_calculation: WORKING - Shows Plan Amount, GST (18%), Total Amount
features_verified.plans_maintenance_type_dropdown: WORKING - No Maintenance Fee, Inclusive, Enter Value options
features_verified.plans_maintenance_fields: WORKING - Amount, GST%, Billing Cycle fields appear when Enter Value selected
features_verified.plans_renewal_amount: WORKING - Renewal amount field visible in plan modal
features_verified.admin_navigation: WORKING - Dashboard, Members, Plans pages accessible
